speaker: speaker2
text: Red cooked carp and rape with fresh mushrooms .

speaker: speaker1
text: Which condiment do you use for ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'll use ginger , garlic scallion , hot pepper and vinegar .

speaker: speaker1
text: Very good , need I help you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No , don't need , I can do myself .

speaker: speaker1
text: Thanks . I can watch TV now .

speaker: speaker2
text: But you must cook that dinner next time .

speaker: speaker1
text: Okay , I'll do it next time .
